structural_softlocks_discovered_in_exist: None at the structural level — bridge_collapse is correctly resolved via questsAnyOrActive on MountainScene (line 223 of sceneRegistry.js).
No quest references a scene that gates on its own id via questsAll/questsAny.
No dependency cycles detected in the quest→item→scene→quest dependency graph.

The 3 INCOMPLETE_DATA warnings are data-coverage gaps in sceneItemGrants.js (items granted via mechanisms outside the grep — e.g. healing_salve appears to be crafted, bio_samples likely come from biology system). These are warnings, not errors — they indicate the manifest needs a follow-up sweep, not a soft-lock.

dev_gating_confirmed.runtimeAudit_call_site: runRuntimeAudit() is called from GameContainer.jsx:287 inside `if (import.meta.env.DEV)` — the new auditProgressionReachability sub-audit inside runtimeAudit.js runs only when runRuntimeAudit() is invoked, so it is transitively DEV-only.
dev_gating_confirmed.questSystem_call_site: Direct `if (import.meta.env.DEV)` block added around runProgressionReachabilityAudit() call in startQuest() at lines ~117-126 of questSystem.js. The audit logs but does NOT abort the quest start (signal, not gate).
